title: Release manifest generator + stored artifact
action: Create scripts/release_manifest.mjs (DIST-01/DIST-03/D-03): enumerate the release-identity file set — the skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/*.mjs and .bee/bin/lib/*.mjs modules via readdirSync (NO hand-kept list — crit-pattern 20260714), PLUS the two individually-named files .claude-plugin/plugin.json and .codex-plugin/plugin.json. Emit one record per file {path (repo-relative), sha256, mode (POSIX octal), role}. ROLE vocabulary (use exactly these): 'source_lib' (templates/lib/*.mjs), 'runtime_lib' (.bee/bin/lib/*.mjs), 'plugin_manifest' (the two plugin.json). Subcommands: `--write` regenerates docs/history/codex-harness-hardening/release-manifest.json; `--check` recomputes and compares vs the stored manifest, printing each mismatch and exiting 1 on any path-set/hash/mode diff, exit 0 when identical; `--selftest` copies the tree metadata to a temp manifest, mutates one covered file's content in a temp copy, and asserts --check-style comparison reports exit 1 naming it (NO mutation of the real tree), exit 0 if the bite is proven. Run --write once to produce the stored manifest for the current 0.1.44 tree. NOT added to commands.verify in this cell (release-gate tool; verify/CI wiring is a later slice).
verify: node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --selftest && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check && echo MANIFEST-CHECK-CLEAN

truths: release_manifest.mjs enumerates lib modules via readdirSync (no hand-kept list) + the two named plugin.json files
each record carries path + sha256 + POSIX mode (octal) + role in {source_lib, runtime_lib, plugin_manifest}
--check exits 1 with per-file mismatch lines on any path-set/hash/mode diff, exit 0 when identical
--selftest bakes the negative proof: mutates a temp copy, asserts the comparison flags it exit 1, without touching the real tree
stored manifest docs/history/codex-harness-hardening/release-manifest.json generated by --write matches the current 0.1.44 tree (--check exits 0 now)
prohibitions: do not add --check to commands.verify in this cell
